title: SKUAST Jammu Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Young Professional II Posts
description: Shere Kashmir University of Agricultural Sciences and Technology Jammu (SKUAST Jammu) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of Young Professional II Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the M.V.Sc, M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the SKUAST Jammu Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
